title: Putin, Xi Jinping maintain constant contact — Kremlin spokesman
description: Dmitry Peskov added that he was unable to say at the moment if Vladimir Putin would pass on a message to Xi Jinping through Russian Prime Minister Mikhail Mishu...
snippet: MOSCOW, October 31. /TASS/. The leaders of Russia and China, Vladimir Putin and Xi Jinping, maintain constant contact, directly or indirectly, Kremlin Spokesman...
